title: Modern chunk detector
description: This mod shows you if a chunk is new (1.19+), can be useful on server like 2b2t or 9b9t
body:
# Modern chunk detector
This mod is a tool that can be used on server that updated their version from a really old version like 1.12 to a more recent one like 1.20. This mod will display a pink overlay on new chunks similar to the chunk border debug option (F3+G).
## How to use it
You can toogle the visibility ON/OFF using the keybind (default is O) that can be changed in settings>controls>keybinds
## How does it works/Limtations
This mod looks in the ground to find if there is copper or ancient debris and if so marks the chunk as new. This means that if there is an anticheat like anti-x-ray the mod will probably get a ton of false positive.
## Screenshots
![screenshot of the mod in action](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76a77740285487e15e4466756ade77da2b363fa2.png)
## Contact
